text: Hello. Hello. Good afternoon. My name is Sophie. I'm reaching out because we're doing a quick coverage gap audit for people before the December 7th cutoff. It's a four-minute look at what your plan actually covers versus what comes out of your own pocket when you need care. Most people are genuinely surprised by the difference. We're just trying to reach everyone on the list before that deadline. So can you let me know if you have both Medicare Part A and Part B? Yes. You have qualified for the updates. All the Medicare benefits are just updated now where you will be qualified to get more help on the dental vision, healthy food allowance, and money back as well. Are you just on Medicare A and B or you also have Medicaid? Medicare. And God forbid you have any chronic illness like diabetes or heart issues and COPD. And do you have a flex card for the healthy food groceries and utilities or you don't have that? Yes. You don't have it, okay? So these are amazing benefits ma'am that you will be qualified for now at $0 cost and we can help you to get help on the dental vision, hearing, co-pays.
